examples: However hydroxyl has no effect on carbon dioxide.
That would require an understanding of hydroxyl and its variability.
Hydroxyl is HO, as opposed to water's H2O, and it is usually the result of water molecules decomposing.
Their H2O turns into H (ie, hydrogen atoms) and OH (so-called hydroxyl molecules).
Peroxynitrite is a source of hydroxyl radical-like reactivity, and it directly oxidizes proteins and other macromolecules with resultant carbonyl formation from side-chain and peptide-bond cleavage.
